input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.1.2
            TITLE: low voltage - lv

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.1.2: Low Voltage - LV
T.9.1.2 Low Voltage - LV  
Any voltage less than and including 60 V DC or 25 V AC RMS

final_answer: rule T.9.1.2: Low Voltage - LV T.9.1.2 Low Voltage - LV Any voltage less than and including 60 V DC or 25 V AC RMS
